description: Writes a shape-validated Firestore seed via the pyric write_firestore_seed tool.
notes: Grounded in the pyric-agents skill's `write_firestore_seed` flow: top-level object keyed by collection name, values are arrays of plain objects. Success is the tool returning ok: true (lint+shape-clean) and the trace containing a `write_firestore_seed` call. If the agent slips into the bare `Write` tool, the fixture fails. Falls back to `trace-contains-tool-call/by-name` plus `final-runtime/run-summary-ok` until a richer pyric-specific spec lands.
prompt: Seed Firestore with two collections via the pyric tools: /books (3 documents, fields: title, author, available) and /borrowers (2 documents, fields: name, activeLoanId). Use write_firestore_seed and respect its strict shape. Do not hand-write the JSON file with a general write tool.
